# calculateTraceStats

> Aggregate cost, duration, and call count per trace

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| traceId | string | yes |
| spans | json | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[llmCalls: call]
  A --> B[totalCost: call]
  B --> C[totalDuration: call]
  C --> D[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `TraceStats`
